title: richella gracilipes
intro: Richella gracilipes, also known as the "Coral Tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. The medicinal properties of Richella gracilipes include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and acting as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Richella gracilipes is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
